content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/providers/details/tabs/Details/components/ConditionsSection/ConditionsSection.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 2 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 25
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   24          <HelperText>
   25            <HelperTextItem>{t('Conditions not found')}</HelperTextItem>
   26          </HelperText>

```

### Fix 2
Line: 18
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

Code context:
```
   17    return (
   18      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
   19        <SectionHeading text={t('Conditions')} />

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/providers/details/tabs/Details/components/ConditionsSection/ConditionsSection.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 25): `HelperTextItem` icon-to-prop migration
Looking at line 25: `<HelperTextItem>{t('Conditions not found')}</HelperTextItem>`

The children here are just text (`t('Conditions not found')`) — there is **no icon** element inside this `HelperTextItem`. The rule fires because the scanner detected the component, but the actual content is purely text. No icon needs to be moved to the `icon` prop. **No change needed.**

### Fix 2 (Line 18): `PageSection variant="light"` → `variant="default"`
Looking at line 18: `<PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">`

The value `"light"` is no longer valid. The replacement options are `"default"` or `"secondary"`. In PatternFly v5, `"light"` was the light background variant, which maps to `"default"` in v6 (the standard/primary background). Change `variant="light"` to `variant="default"`.

Let me apply the changes:
Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The `<HelperTextItem>` on line 25 contains only text (`t('Conditions not found')`) — there is no icon element to move to the `icon` prop. The rule fired on the component but the migration pattern does not apply here. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light` | **Applied** | Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"` on `<PageSection>` at line 18. In PF v6, `"light"` is no longer valid; `"default"` is the equivalent standard background variant. |
